content: The Tavily API is a research tool for powering AI agents, priced primarily by API credits. It offers a free “Researcher” plan with 1,000 credits/month and email support, and a pay-as-you-go option at $0.008 per credit with flexible usage and cancellation. A “Project” plan (for enthusiasts) provides 4,000 credits/month with higher rate limits and email support, while “Enterprise” plans are custom, with tailored API calls, rate limits, enterprise support/SLAs, and enhanced security/privacy. Tavily is also free for students.
